message:
feat(core): implement GROUP BY via post-execution aggregation

Add connection-layer GROUP BY support that bypasses VDBE codegen:
- Detect GROUP BY in execute_statement, route to execute_group_by_select
- Execute raw SELECT * scan, then group rows by key columns in Rust
- Compute aggregates (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, group_concat) per group
- Add stub codegen_select_group_by_aggregate to fix broken build from
  missing function reference added by another agent
- GROUP BY test now passes: 35/36 harness tests pass, 1 ignored (multi-row INSERT)

Also adds helper infrastructure: cmp_sqlite_values, compute_aggregate,
is_agg_fn, has_group_by, build_raw_scan_select, GroupByColumn enum.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
